args.query:
SELECT trim(CASE WHEN substr("Order".OwnerId,1,1) = '#' THEN substr("Order".OwnerId,2) ELSE "Order".OwnerId END) AS OwnerId, 
SUM(COALESCE(OrderItem.Quantity,0) * COALESCE(OrderItem.UnitPrice,0)) AS total_sales
FROM "Order"
JOIN OrderItem ON "Order".Id = OrderItem.OrderId
WHERE "Order".EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND "Order".EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25'
GROUP BY OwnerId
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT trim(CASE WHEN substr("Order".OwnerId,1,1) = '#' THEN substr("Order".OwnerId,2) ELSE "Order".OwnerId END) AS OwnerId, 
SUM(COALESCE(OrderItem.Quantity,0) * COALESCE(OrderItem.UnitPrice,0)) AS total_sales
FROM "Order"
JOIN OrderItem ON "Order".Id = OrderItem.OrderId
WHERE "Order".EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND "Order".EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25'
GROUP BY OwnerId
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 1;
